blended.narrative: Red Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Friday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
